---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- A short, one-line description of the feature you want. -->

## 🎯 Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature address?
     Example: "I always have to manually calculate cm → px conversions..." -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you imagine this working in the UI/UX.
     Include mockups, sketches, or references if you have them. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways to solve this? -->

## 📌 Use Case

<!-- Who would benefit from this? (e.g. "Useful for passport photo sizing") -->

## 📝 Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, links, or screenshots. -->
